TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: olah O ciolahay a tamdaw i, o kodaitay, o kalasini'adaay, caay ka 'inap, caay pasneng a misatakaraw ko faloco', caay pakangodo to tamdaw, caay pisatked, caay ka kter, caay pitafo i faloco' to tatiih no tao, caay ka lipahak to tatiihay, o so'linay a dmak ko kalipahakan ningra. Pakahadidi, caay ka lasawad ko pipaso'lin ningra ato pitala ningra ato olah ningra. Caay ka citolas ko olah no mafana'ay to olah no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~uɾaħ o~u ʦio~uɾaħaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj, o~u kaɾasiniʡaɬ~ɮaaj, ʦaaj ka ʡinap, ʦaaj pasnəŋ a misatakaraw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, ʦaaj pakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj pisatkəɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj ka ktər, ʦaaj pitafo~u i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u tatiiħ no~u tao~u, ʦaaj ka ɾipaħak to~u tatiiħaj, o~u so~uʡɾinaj a ɬ~ɮmak ko~u kaɾipaħakan niŋra. pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi, ʦaaj ka ɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u pipaso~uʡɾin niŋra ato~u pitaɾa niŋra ato~u o~uɾaħ niŋra. ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɾas ko~u o~uɾaħ no~u mafanaʡaj to~u o~uɾaħ no~u kawas.
S.FORM: olah O ciolahay a tamdaw i, o kodaitay, o kalasini'adaay, caay ka 'inap, caay pasneng a misatakaraw ko faloco', caay pakangodo to tamdaw, caay pisatked, caay ka kter, caay pitafo i faloco' to tatiih no tao, caay ka lipahak to tatiihay, o so'linay a dmak ko kalipahakan ningra. Pakahadidi, caay ka lasawad ko pipaso'lin ningra ato pitala ningra ato olah ningra. Caay ka citolas ko olah no mafana'ay to olah no Kawas.
S.PHON: o~uɾaħ o~u ʦio~uɾaħaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, o~u ko~uɬ~ɮaitaj, o~u kaɾasiniʡaɬ~ɮaaj, ʦaaj ka ʡinap, ʦaaj pasnəŋ a misatakaraw ko~u faɾo~uʦo~uʡ, ʦaaj pakaŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj pisatkəɬ~ɮ, ʦaaj ka ktər, ʦaaj pitafo~u i faɾo~uʦo~uʡ to~u tatiiħ no~u tao~u, ʦaaj ka ɾipaħak to~u tatiiħaj, o~u so~uʡɾinaj a ɬ~ɮmak ko~u kaɾipaħakan niŋra. pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi, ʦaaj ka ɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u pipaso~uʡɾin niŋra ato~u pitaɾa niŋra ato~u o~uɾaħ niŋra. ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɾas ko~u o~uɾaħ no~u mafanaʡaj to~u o~uɾaħ no~u kawas.
